title: Special Programs: Career and Technical Education
description: Career and technical education (CTE) programs give students the opportunity to explore real-world career pathways and develop practical job skills while still in school. Conroe ISD follows state guidelines to ensure these programs are accessible, high-quality, and aligned with workforce needs in the region. Parents and students can use this policy to understand how CTE courses are structured, who is eligible to participate, and how the district supports student success in these programs.
